problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: If Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering is applied to fully, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
